description: Pre-Work Validation Hook Configuration - Enforces Erinn AI workflow before code changes

core_principles.sdk_only: SDK is the ONLY interface to .erinn/ - never direct Write/Edit
core_principles.spike_planning: Spikes are for planning and creating work items (via SDK only)

always_allow.description: Read-only tools are always allowed without work items

always_deny.description: Operations that are NEVER allowed (even with active work)

direct_htmlgraph_writes.message: Never write directly to .erinn/. Use SDK: erinn feature create/start/complete
direct_htmlgraph_writes.suggestion:
Use SDK commands:
  erinn feature create 'Title'
  erinn feature start <id>
  erinn bug create 'Title'

sdk_commands.description: Bash commands that invoke Erinn AI SDK

spike.description: Spikes (auto or manual) are for planning and creating work items via SDK

code_bash: Bash that modifies code (go build, npm, git commit, etc.)

spike.deny_message:
Spike '{spike_id}' is for planning only.

Allowed:
  - Read operations (Read, Grep, Glob)
  - SDK commands (erinn feature create)

For code changes:
  1. Create feature: erinn feature create 'Title'
  2. Start feature: erinn feature start <id>
  3. Then make code changes

implementation.description: Features, bugs, chores allow all code operations (except direct .erinn/ writes)

code_operations.description: Tools and bash commands that modify code

permission_responses.description: Standard JSON responses for permission decisions

sdk_command_with_spike.reason: Planning with spike {spike_id}: creating work items via SDK

no_work_item_code_change.reason:
INSTRUCTION: Before this file operation, create and start a work item. Execute:

erinn feature create 'Your feature description here'
erinn feature start <id>

Then retry the file operation.
no_work_item_code_change.suggestion: Work item required for code changes

spike_code_change_denied.reason:
INSTRUCTION: Spike '{spike_id}' is for planning only. Before this file operation, create an implementation work item. Execute:

erinn feature create 'Implement [describe the change]'
erinn feature start <id>

Then retry the file operation.

direct_htmlgraph_write_denied.reason:
INSTRUCTION: Never write directly to .erinn/ files. Use the CLI instead. For tracking operations, use:

erinn feature create 'Title'
erinn feature start <id>
erinn bug create 'Title'

The CLI is the only interface to .erinn/ data.
direct_htmlgraph_write_denied.suggestion: Use SDK - never direct file writes to .erinn/

validation_workflow.description: Steps for validating tool calls before execution

steps.description: Check if tool is always allowed (Read, Glob, Grep, LSP, read-only Bash)
Check if direct write to .erinn/ (always denied)
Classify as: SDK command, code operation, or other
Query for active work item (in-progress status)
Apply rules based on active work type (spike vs implementation)
